candidates.prompt: For binance-futures BTCUSDT, what are the latest BTC close price, funding rate, dollar open interest, dollar volume, and buy/sell liquidation dollar volumes over the most recent Velo futures rows?
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows calls velo-node client.rows with type=futures, exchanges=[binance-futures], products=[BTCUSDT]; rows include close_price, funding_rate, dollar_open_interest_close, dollar_volume, buy_liquidations_dollar_volume, sell_liquidations_dollar_volume.

candidates.prompt: For binance spot BTCUSDT, what are the latest BTC close price and dollar volume from Velo spot rows?
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows calls client.rows with type=spot, exchanges=[binance], products=[BTCUSDT]; spot rows include close_price and dollar_volume.

candidates.prompt: For deribit options BTC, what are the latest Velo options values for index_price, iv_1w, iv_1m, skew_1w, skew_1m, and dollar_volume?
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows calls client.rows with type=options for Deribit BTC; options columns include index_price, iv_1w, iv_1m, skew_1w, skew_1m, dollar_volume.

candidates.prompt: For BTC market cap in Velo, what are the latest circ, circ_dollars, fdv, and fdv_dollars values?
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_caps calls client.marketCaps with coins=[BTC]; rows include circ, circ_dollars, fdv, fdv_dollars.

candidates.prompt: For binance-futures ETHUSDT, is ETH showing negative funding with rising or falling dollar open interest and liquidation imbalance over the last 24 hours?
candidates.answerabilityNote: analyze_futures_market_structure summarizes latestFundingRate, openInterestChangeUsd, buy/sell liquidations, and totalDollarVolume from futures rows.

candidates.prompt: For binance-futures SOLUSDT, does the recent Velo futures structure show positive funding being paired with increasing open interest, and what does that imply about crowded long risk?
candidates.answerabilityNote: analyze_futures_market_structure supports SOLUSDT futures rows with funding_rate, dollar_open_interest_close, dollar_volume, and liquidation columns.

candidates.prompt: For binance spot BTCUSDT, summarize the last 24 hours of BTC spot close_price and dollar_volume trend from Velo rows and flag whether volume expanded into the latest move.
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows with type=spot, exchange binance, product BTCUSDT, lookbackHours=24, columns close_price and dollar_volume.

candidates.prompt: For deribit options ETH, analyze whether the ETH volatility surface is front-loaded by comparing iv_1w, iv_1m, iv_3m, skew_1w, skew_1m, and dvol_close from Velo options rows.
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows with type=options for Deribit ETH returns IV, skew, dvol_close, and index_price columns.

candidates.prompt: For BTC Velo term structure, identify whether BTC forward IV is upward sloping or inverted across the dte points currently returned by Velo.
candidates.answerabilityNote: get_futures_term_structure calls client.termStructure with coins=[BTC]; rows include dte, at_the_money_iv, and fwd_iv.

candidates.prompt: Compare BTC futures pressure across binance-futures BTCUSDT, bybit BTCUSDT, okex-swap BTC-USDT-SWAP, and hyperliquid BTC-USD using funding rate, dollar open interest change, dollar volume, and liquidation imbalance.

groundedEntity.title: BTC futures across binance-futures BTCUSDT, bybit BTCUSDT, okex-swap BTC-USDT-SWAP, and hyperliquid BTC-USD

candidates.answerabilityNote: analyze_futures_market_structure can query BTC futures rows by coin/exchange and summarize funding, OI change, volume, and liquidation imbalance.

candidates.prompt: Compare binance-futures BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT over the last 24 hours: which has the most stretched combination of funding rate, open-interest change, liquidation imbalance, and dollar volume?
Compare deribit options BTC and deribit options ETH: which has the richer 1-week implied volatility and steeper short-term skew according to Velo options rows?

groundedEntity.title: deribit options BTC and deribit options ETH

candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows with type=options for BTC and ETH returns iv_1w, skew_1w, iv_1m, skew_1m, dollar_volume, and index_price.

candidates.prompt: Compare binance spot BTCUSDT with binance-futures BTCUSDT: is the latest BTC move better supported by spot dollar volume or by perp open-interest expansion and funding?

groundedEntity.title: binance spot BTCUSDT and binance-futures BTCUSDT

candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows can fetch spot rows for binance BTCUSDT and futures rows for binance-futures BTCUSDT.

candidates.prompt: For binance-futures BTCUSDT, combine Velo futures rows, order book depth, and BTC-tagged Velo news to decide whether current BTC positioning looks like a crowded short, crowded long, or neutral setup.
candidates.answerabilityNote: Use analyze_futures_market_structure, get_order_book_depth, and get_recent_news for BTC positioning, liquidity, and news context.

candidates.prompt: For deribit options ETH and binance-futures ETHUSDT, combine ETH options IV/skew with ETH futures funding, OI change, and liquidation imbalance to judge whether ETH downside protection is being priced alongside perp stress.

groundedEntity.title: deribit options ETH and binance-futures ETHUSDT

candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows(type=options) supplies ETH IV/skew; analyze_futures_market_structure supplies ETH funding, OI change, and liquidation imbalance.

candidates.prompt: For binance-futures SOLUSDT, combine SOL futures funding/OI/liquidations with SOL market-cap context from Velo to estimate whether current SOL perp leverage looks large relative to the coin size.
candidates.answerabilityNote: analyze_futures_market_structure returns SOL OI, volume, funding, and liquidation imbalance; get_market_caps returns SOL circ_dollars/fdv_dollars.

candidates.prompt: Build a same-venue carry and liquidity shortlist across binance-futures BTCUSDT, binance-futures ETHUSDT, and binance-futures SOLUSDT: rank each by funding attractiveness, open-interest risk, liquidation imbalance, recent dollar volume, and available order book depth.
candidates.answerabilityNote: analyze_futures_market_structure provides funding/OI/volume/liquidations; get_order_book_depth adds latestMid and depth rows for each product.

candidates.prompt: For a hypothetical 5 million dollar BTC perp execution, compare binance-futures BTCUSDT, bybit BTCUSDT, okex-swap BTC-USDT-SWAP, and hyperliquid BTC-USD using Velo order book depth, latest mid, funding rate, dollar volume, and open interest; which venue looks least costly and least crowded?

groundedEntity.title: BTC perp execution set across Binance, Bybit, OKX, and Hyperliquid in Velo

candidates.answerabilityNote: get_order_book_depth returns latestMid and depth rows; analyze_futures_market_structure returns funding, dollar volume, and dollar open interest for the BTC exchange/product set.

candidates.prompt: For deribit options BTC, deribit options ETH, binance-futures BTCUSDT, and binance-futures ETHUSDT, build a volatility-versus-leverage read: which coin has the more compelling options-vol setup after accounting for perp funding, OI change, and liquidation pressure?

groundedEntity.title: Deribit BTC/ETH options with binance-futures BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT

candidates.answerabilityNote: get_market_rows(type=options) supplies BTC/ETH IV/skew/dvol; analyze_futures_market_structure supplies BTC/ETH funding, OI change, volume, and liquidation imbalance.
